auth.label: API Key
auth.description: JobNimbus API key used with the Authorization: Bearer header. Create it in JobNimbus under Settings > API Keys, as described in the official authorization docs: https://developer.jobnimbus.com/docs/authorization

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create one JobNimbus contact from a raw contact payload, with optional actor, bulk, and skip controls.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

bulk.description: Whether to ask JobNimbus for optimistic bulk persistence on this write request.

skip.description: The JobNimbus automated steps to bypass, such as automation or notification.

data.description: The raw JobNimbus contact payload to send to the API, including standard and custom fields.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating one JobNimbus contact.

contact.description: The raw JobNimbus contact record returned by the API.

actions.name: create_job
actions.description: Create one JobNimbus job from a raw job payload, with optional actor, bulk, and skip controls.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

bulk.description: Whether to ask JobNimbus for optimistic bulk persistence on this write request.

skip.description: The JobNimbus automated steps to bypass, such as automation or notification.

data.description: The raw JobNimbus job payload to send to the API, including standard and custom fields.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating one JobNimbus job.

job.description: The raw JobNimbus job record returned by the API.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Get one JobNimbus contact by ID.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

fields.description: The JobNimbus field names to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading one JobNimbus contact.

contact.description: The raw JobNimbus contact record returned by the API.

actions.name: get_job
actions.description: Get one JobNimbus job by ID.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

fields.description: The JobNimbus field names to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading one JobNimbus job.

job.description: The raw JobNimbus job record returned by the API.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List JobNimbus contacts with the standard pagination, sorting, field selection, actor, and Elasticsearch-style filter options.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

size.description: The maximum number of contacts to return.

from.description: The zero-based starting offset for pagination.

sortField.description: The JobNimbus field name used for sorting.

fields.description: The JobNimbus field names to include in the response.

filter.description: A JobNimbus Elasticsearch-style filter object that will be JSON-encoded for the filter query parameter.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing JobNimbus contacts.

count.description: The total number of contacts returned by the API response.

items.description: The raw JobNimbus contact record returned by the API.

contacts.description: The JobNimbus contacts returned for this request.

outputSchema.description: The normalized JobNimbus contact list response.

actions.name: list_jobs
actions.description: List JobNimbus jobs with the standard pagination, sorting, field selection, actor, and Elasticsearch-style filter options.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

size.description: The maximum number of jobs to return.

from.description: The zero-based starting offset for pagination.

sortField.description: The JobNimbus field name used for sorting.

fields.description: The JobNimbus field names to include in the response.

filter.description: A JobNimbus Elasticsearch-style filter object that will be JSON-encoded for the filter query parameter.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing JobNimbus jobs.

count.description: The total number of jobs returned by the API response.

items.description: The raw JobNimbus job record returned by the API.

jobs.description: The JobNimbus jobs returned for this request.

outputSchema.description: The normalized JobNimbus job list response.

actions.name: update_contact
actions.description: Update one JobNimbus contact by ID from a raw contact payload, with optional actor, bulk, and skip controls.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

bulk.description: Whether to ask JobNimbus for optimistic bulk persistence on this write request.

skip.description: The JobNimbus automated steps to bypass, such as automation or notification.

data.description: The raw JobNimbus contact payload to send to the API, including standard and custom fields.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating one JobNimbus contact.

contact.description: The raw JobNimbus contact record returned by the API.

actions.name: update_job
actions.description: Update one JobNimbus job by ID from a raw job payload, with optional actor, bulk, and skip controls.

actor.description: The optional JobNimbus actor email used to execute the request as a specific team member.

bulk.description: Whether to ask JobNimbus for optimistic bulk persistence on this write request.

skip.description: The JobNimbus automated steps to bypass, such as automation or notification.

data.description: The raw JobNimbus job payload to send to the API, including standard and custom fields.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating one JobNimbus job.

job.description: The raw JobNimbus job record returned by the API.
